mapper.select: select aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep order by aprvlineid, seq
select aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep where aprvlineid = #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by aprvlineid, seq

select s.aprvlineid, s.seq, s.stepname, s.approvalid, s.approvalname, u.APPROVERID, u.APPROVERNAME from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep s, cotdl.TBL_PIIAPPROVALUSER u where s.aprvlineid = #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and s.aprvlineid = u.aprvlineid and s.seq = u.seq order by aprvlineid, seq
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep (aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approvalid, approvalname) values (#{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep (aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approvalid, approvalname) values (#{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep where aprvlineid= #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq= #{seq}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep where aprvlineid= #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep
order by aprvlineid, seq limit #{offset}, #{amount}
